app.name: Safeguard
app.tagline: A calm place to keep your health story straight.

pilot.notice: Pilot. Not affiliated with the NHS. Not a clinical record system. Nothing is shared without an action you take.

languages.label: Language
languages.scaffoldedNotice: This language is partly translated. Some text still shows in English while we finish the translation.

landing.title: A calm place to keep your health story straight.
landing.intro: Safeguard helps you record how you are feeling each day, in your own language. A clinician you choose can read what you wrote, in plain English, when you decide to share it.

onboarding.title: Set up Safeguard
onboarding.subtitle: We will ask a few questions so a future GP can pick up where your last clinician left off. You can edit any of this later.

q.language: Which language would you like to use Safeguard in?
q.languageBody: You can change this any time from settings.
q.preferredName: What would you like Safeguard to call you?
q.nativeLanguageBody: A clinician may need this to book an interpreter.
q.secondaryLanguage: Is there another language you are comfortable in?
q.secondaryLanguageBody: Optional. Choose 'None' if you would rather not say.
q.literacy: How comfortable are you with reading and writing in your language?
q.literacyBody: There is no better or worse answer. This just helps us show information in a way that suits you.
q.dobBody: The year alone is fine if you prefer.
q.gpName: Your GP's name (if you know it)
q.gpNameBody: You can skip this if you do not have a GP yet.
q.gpSurgery: GP surgery or clinic name (if known)
q.concerns: Are there any health concerns you want a clinician to know about?
q.concernsBody: Write in your own language. It is okay to leave this blank.
q.medications: What medication do you currently take?
q.medicationsBody: Name and dose if you know them. You can skip this.
q.audio: Would you like text read out loud?
q.slowerPacing: Would you like one question at a time, no rush?
q.trustedNameBody: Safeguard will never contact them automatically. Their name and number only appear on the 'I need help now' screen.
q.trustedRelation: How are they related to you? (e.g. friend, sister)
q.consentStorage: Do you agree to your answers being stored on the Safeguard server?
q.consentStorageBody: This is needed so a clinician you choose can read them later.
q.consentAi: Do you agree to an AI tool reading your answers to write a short observational summary in English?
q.consentAiBody: Safeguard never gives medical advice. The summary just describes what you wrote.

fields.preferredName: What would you like Safeguard to call you?
fields.dateOfBirth: Date of birth (year is enough if you prefer)
fields.secondaryLanguage: Other language you are comfortable in (optional)
fields.literacy: How comfortable are you with reading and writing in your language?
fields.ongoingConcerns: Health concerns you want a clinician to know about
fields.currentMedications: Medication you currently take (name and dose if known)
fields.slowerPacing: Show one question at a time, no rush
fields.consentStorage: I understand my answers will be stored on the Safeguard server so a clinician I choose can read them later.
fields.consentAi: I understand an AI tool will read my answers to write a short observational summary in English. Safeguard never gives medical advice.

onboarding.trustedContactIntro: If you would like, give us one person you trust. Safeguard will only show you their name and number on the Need-help-now screen — it will never contact them automatically.
onboarding.consentIntro: Both consents are required to save the profile and check in. You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account.
onboarding.consentRequired: Both consents are required to continue.

home.todayDone: You have already checked in today. Thank you.
home.todayPrompt: Would you like to do today's check-in?

checkin.title: Today's check-in
checkin.intro: Take your time. There are no right answers. Skip anything you would rather not answer.
checkin.skipHint: Do not want to answer this one? Just press Continue.

scores.generalFeeling: How are you feeling in general today?
scores.pain: How much pain are you in today?
scores.foodWater: Have you been able to eat and drink water today?
scores.medication: Have you been able to take your medication as planned today?
scores.sleep: How well did you sleep last night?
scores.safety: Do you feel safe where you are right now?

checkin.freeText: Anything else you want a clinician to know about today? Write in your own language.
checkin.freeTextPlaceholder: It is okay to leave this blank.
checkin.thanks: Saved. Safeguard wrote a short observational summary for a future clinician. You can read it below.
checkin.rawHeading: What you wrote (kept exactly as you wrote it)

week.title: This week
week.empty: No check-ins yet this week. That is okay.
week.flagged: Safety flag — please tell someone you trust.

trendKind.trend_missed_checkin: No check-in in a few days

support.title: If you need help now
support.intro: Safeguard is not a clinical service. If you need help now, please contact one of these instead. They have people who answer in many languages.

nhs111.name: NHS 111
nhs111.what: Free UK health advice line. Open 24 hours. Translators available.

samaritans.name: Samaritans
samaritans.what: Free, confidential listening line for any kind of distress. Open 24 hours.

refugeeCouncil.name: British Red Cross — Refugee Support
refugeeCouncil.what: Practical help and signposting for people seeking asylum or with refugee status.

emergency.name: Emergency (life-threatening)
emergency.what: Police, fire, or ambulance for an immediate emergency.

human_authority.title: Humans make the medical decisions
human_authority.rule: Safeguard never gives medical advice. It records what you write so a clinician you choose can read it.

communication_clarity.title: Plain language, in your language
communication_clarity.rule: Everything is in the language you choose. Translations are clearly labelled. Your original words are always kept.

transparency.title: You can see everything Safeguard stores
transparency.rule: Anything saved about you is shown back to you, with a one-line reason. Nothing is hidden.

safeguarding_support.title: Help is always one tap away
safeguarding_support.rule: Every screen has an 'I need help now' button with non-clinical UK support numbers.

emotional_boundary.title: Companion, not friend
emotional_boundary.rule: Safeguard speaks calmly and clinically. It does not pretend to be a friend or to remember you personally.

pilot_scope.title: Pilot scope is honest
pilot_scope.rule: Safeguard is a pilot. It is not the NHS. Nothing is shared without an action you take.
